title: Fire tools
description: This  modification offers you a toolkit and will provide you with Emerald and Fire armor.
body:
The Fire Tools modification offers you fire armor and tools, including two types of swords, a hammer (pickaxe), a shovel, and emberald armor. This modification is designed for the later period of the game, as the creation of items is a very difficult process. Its main purpose is to improve resource extraction and facilitate construction. Each tool or armor gives you a fire resistance effect.

For crafting, the modification uses fire stars and sticks, with sticks made from two fire stars. There are two types of swords available in the modification: normal and gravity. The first sword is a deteriorated version of the second. But the gravity sword, in addition to its high damage, disables gravity for the mobs it hits.
